name: Omnipresent Global Employment API
what_it_does: Employer of Record (EOR) platform with API for hiring and managing employees in 160+ countries without setting up legal entities — handling employment contracts, payroll, benefits, and compliance for internationally distributed teams.
use_cases: Onboarding new employees in foreign countries via API without legal entity setup
Querying employee contract and payroll status for HR system integration
Managing international employment lifecycle (onboarding through offboarding) via API
Syncing EOR employee data with HRIS systems for consolidated HR management
Automating compliance reporting for global employment contracts
not_for: Contractor management (EOR is for full employment, use specialized contractor tools)
Teams with existing legal entities who need payroll software only (use Gusto or Personio)
best_when: A company needs to hire full-time employees in countries where they have no legal entity, with API integration for HRIS systems.
avoid_when: You employ contractors (not employees), have established entities in target countries, or only hire domestically.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with scoped access tokens. Client credentials flow for M2M integration. Workspace-scoped access. Token management for partner integrations. API access requires partner or enterprise plan.

pricing.paid_tiers: EOR fees per employee from $499/month + local payroll costs; API via partner program
pricing.notes: EOR pricing per employee per month plus local employment costs. API access primarily for HRIS integration partners. UK-based company with strong EU operations. Enterprise SLAs available.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers employee management, contracts, and payroll data. OAuth2 with scopes for HRIS integration. Webhook support for employment lifecycle events. API primarily for integration partners.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Employee record reads are idempotent. Onboarding operations are sequential processes — partial idempotency within workflow stages. Status queries always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires partner program enrollment — not self-serve
Employee onboarding involves legal review steps — not fully automatable via API
Country-specific employment law variations affect API data models
Sensitive employee PII requires strong data governance in agent handling

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Employee PII handled with enterprise-grade security. UK company with strong European compliance culture.
